title: Paladium Enthusiast
description: Forget Diamond. Upgrade your adventure with the legendary Paladium ores! Mine Amethyst, Titane, and Paladium, and craft the ultimate Endium gear to dominate your world.
body:
[https://github.com/Princelion33/Paladium/tree/main#readme](https://github.com/Princelion33/Paladium/tree/main#readme)

Diamond is no longer the limit.

Bring the legendary experience of the Paladium server straight into your single-player world or private server. The Paladium Expansion Mod introduces a complete new tier of progression, bridging the gap between vanilla gameplay and god-tier power.

🔥 Key Features:

New Ore Progression: The mines have changed. Dig deeper to find Amethyst and Titane, uncover the rare Paladium (and its legendary Green variant), and hunt for the elusive Endium.

God-Tier Gear: Craft weapons and tools that far surpass Netherite. From the speed of the Amethyst Sword to the sheer destructive power of the Endium Sword, fight with gear that feels truly powerful.

Unbreakable Defense: Suit up in 5 new armor sets. Whether you want the sleek look of Titane or the ultimate protection of Endium, you'll be ready for any battle.

Base Building: Flex your wealth with stunning decorative blocks made from your precious resources.

Ready to become the strongest? Download Paladium Expansion today!
